label: Subprime credit crisis + GFC
trigger: ABCP + repo funding chain seized as subprime collateral re-priced; leverage at broker-dealers forced fire-sale deleveraging; a solvency (not just liquidity) crisis at systemic nodes.

outcomes.t_plus_3y: SPX recovered most of the drawdown by 2011
outcomes.t_plus_5y: New highs by 2013; financials structurally re-regulated

pit_note: Real-time leading markers: IG-HY divergence then convergence, TED/LIBOR-OIS blowout, ABCP runoff, money-market 'breaking the buck'. The 2026 funding-chain-rupture concept is built to catch this class early.
